The company’s stance creates inconsistencies between its public documents and actual product behavior.

title: Git for Windows v2.54.0 发布
content: Git for Windows v2.54.0 has been released, bringing updates since v2.53.0. The build no longer includes git svn due to maintenance issues; users are advised to use the Linux version via WSL or install the MSYS2 package `mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-git-svn`. Included components are Git 2.54.0, Bash 5.3.9, Git Credential Manager 2.7.3, MinTTY 3.8.2, MSYS2 runtime (Cygwin 3.6.7), cURL 8.19.0, OpenSSH 10.3.P1, and OpenSSL 3.5.6. Bug fixes added the missing iconv executable, corrected character display in Bash, improved cleanup and core detection, extended TLS renegotiation timeout to 60 s, disabled NTLM fallback, and removed GitWeb.

title: Kimi K2.6 发布并开源

content: The 2026 lithium market faces tighter carbon‑oxide lithium supply, with effective global supply cut by about 7 t LCE to 198 t after new disruptions in Australia, Zimbabwe, Nigeria and Jiangxi. Demand rises by nearly 20 t LCE, driven by a 26 % lift in global EV battery needs and reassessed industrial demand. Supply shocks from diesel shortages, export bans and regulatory delays, combined with limited new projects, shift the balance from slack to tight, raising prices and exposing supply chain vulnerabilities.

title: 苹果官宣换帅：库克卸任CEO，特努斯接任
content: Apple announced that Tim Cook will step down as CEO and become executive chairman, while John Ternus will take over as CEO on September 1. The transition follows the retirement of other top executives. Cook’s 15‑year tenure grew Apple’s market value and revenue massively and pushed the company into chip design, wearables, and sustainability. Ternus, a long‑time product engineer, will lead the next era, supported by a newly formed core team focused on AI, hardware, and design.

title: 字节跳动 2025 年海外营收占比创新高，AI 投入致公司净利大降 70%
content: ByteDance’s overseas revenue rose nearly 50% in 2025, outpacing domestic growth of about 20%. International sales now account for more than 30% of total revenue, a record high, driven mainly by TikTok’s e‑commerce. However, net profit fell over 70% as the company heavily invested in AI during late 2024, sharply reducing profit margins.

title: 抖音副总裁李亮：不考虑优先股和期权成本变动的话，字节总体营收和利润还是增长的
content: TikTok‑group VP Li Liang clarified that ByteDance’s reported 70% drop in net profit was largely due to accounting items such as preferred‑stock and option costs, not operational performance. While e‑commerce growth slowed and new‑business investment increased, leading to a modest decline in operating margin, the company’s overall revenue and earnings still grew. Li Liang noted positive trends in TikTok’s e‑commerce and emerging‑business segments.

The Qwen3.6 lineup now includes Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, Qwen3.6-Plus, Qwen3.6-Flash, and open‑source Qwen3.6‑35B‑A3B.

However, several artists quickly denied having signed any authorization agreement, sparking public debate over the legality and artist‑rights implications of AI use in entertainment.

title: Kimi K2.6 发布并开源，集群能力全面提升
content: Kimi released the open‑source Kimi K2.6, a versatile model whose agent, coding, and visual‑understanding abilities surpass or match closed‑source competitors such as GPT‑5.4 on many benchmarks. The model can encode continuously for 13 hours and write or modify over 4,000 lines of code. Its autonomous agent capability has been massively expanded: up to 300 sub‑agents can work in parallel to complete 4,000 collaborative steps. For high‑load workflows, it can automatically handle tasks and run continuously for five days.

title: 阿里 HappyHorse 将于 4 月 27 日开放测试

title: 预测市场平台 Polymarket 正以约 150 亿美元估值洽谈融资
content: Polymarket, a prediction‑market platform, is negotiating a round that would value it at about $15 billion, including new investment. It seeks to raise $400 million, with Intercontinental Exchange already contributing $600 million. The company aims to bring in additional strategic investors and could expand the total funding to $1 billion. The valuation marks a 66 % rise from last October, though it remains below competitor Kalshi’s $22 billion.

title: 主流网页部署平台 Vercel 遭黑客入侵，第三方 AI 工具成攻击突破口
content: Vercel, a popular web application hosting platform, was breached by hackers who aimed to sell stolen data. The attackers exploited a compromised third‑party AI tool, reportedly a Google Cloud Workspace OAuth application, to access Vercel’s environment. A individual claiming affiliation with “ShinyHunters” released some data, including employee names, email addresses, and timestamps. Vercel confirmed a limited impact, advised clients to review logs, audit suspicious activity, and rotate environment variables, and published infiltration metrics for affected users.

title: Rethinking Git for the Age of Coding Agents with GitHub Cofounder Scott Chacon
content: Scott Chacon, GitHub cofounder and CEO of GitButler, discusses why Git’s interface has stayed largely unchanged since 2005 and how GitButler is redesigning version control for both humans and AI agents. The conversation covers parallel branches, agent‑optimized CLI design, future code review workflows, and the importance of strong writing skills for next‑generation engineers. The discussion highlights potential evolutions toward a more AI‑friendly version control system and the broader impact on software development.

title: Changes to GitHub Copilot Individual plans
content: GitHub Copilot is pausing new sign‑ups for Pro, Pro+, and Student plans and tightening usage limits to protect existing customers. Pro+ offers over five times the limits of Pro, and limits are now shown in VS Code and the CLI. Opus models are removed from Pro plans, with Opus 4.7 remaining only in Pro+. Users hitting limits can downgrade or request refunds between April 20 and May 20. The changes aim to balance service reliability with growing agent workloads.

title: Highlights from Git 2.54
content: Git 2.54 introduces the experimental “git history” command for simple rewrites (reword and split), configuration‑based hooks that can be shared across repositories, and makes geometric repacking the default maintenance strategy. It adds usability improvements to git add –p, refines git replay, and improves HTTP retry logic. git log –L now works with pickaxe options, and incremental multi‑pack indexes receive compaction. New options include git rebase –trailer, status.compareBranches, and blast‑back fill revisions, while alias names can use non‑ASCII characters.
